macro.title: How much will mortgage rates fall with the Iran deal and Fed week?
macro.what: The 10-year yield is 4.43% and mortgage rates are 6.58%, with Fed week and inflation data setting the next move.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Why housing demand is up and inventory is down in 2026
macro.what: Pending sales rose to 75,856 vs 72,039 in 2025 as inventory turned negative year over year with mortgage rates near 6.58%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Markets await Warsh’s first meeting as Fed chair
macro.what: Markets expect the Fed to hold rates, but Warsh’s June 17 debut press conference and continued high inflation will shape expectations.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.what: High housing costs and economic instability are driving would-be buyers away

macro.title: This Week’s Inflation and Sentiment Data May Clarify the Fed’s Path
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: With the Strait of Hormuz still closed and fresh off a hot jobs report last week, rates are at risk of climbing further this week if Wednesday’s inflation data comes in above expectations
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: HUD would permit multi-story manufactured homes without a permanent chassis
housing.what: HUD proposes expanding manufactured home rules for multi-story designs, allowing upper sections without a chassis that can cost $5,000 to $10,000.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Report lays out wealth, housing gaps facing LGBTQ+ Gen Z
housing.what: Respondents said heterosexual individuals are more likely than a LGBTQ+ person to receive financial support, such as down payment assistance.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Colorado’s Drive It Home financing kicks off with affordable condos
housing.what: A small condominium project in Denver’s West Colfax neighborhood may be the best evidence yet that Colorado’s housing reforms are producing real results
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Lennar Q2 2026 results test the land-light model
housing.what: While the world gets swept up in the euphoria of SpaceX’s IPO, some of the rest of us remain anchored to a more down-to-earth – but no less fascinating – domain, where gravity’s still a thing
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: SpaceX Employees Could Buy 2 in 5 San Antonio Homes With Their IPO Windfall
housing.what: The massive IPO would create enough wealth for SpaceX employees to buy roughly 40% of all the homes in San Antonio, one of the closest major metros to where the company is headquartered
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
